_meta.author: Jason (backend-strategy)
_meta.description: v47 closes compoundReturn / compoundReturnNetOfBenchmark from API surface. Returns fields promoted into dedicated `returns` object. schemaVersion field added to endpoint response for scanner verification.

breaking_changes_from_v46: compoundReturn removed from headlineMetrics and top-level snapshot
compoundReturnNetOfBenchmark removed (was already removed in v46 from top-level; now also enforced in headlineMetrics)
returns object added at top-level snapshot with strategyNetAbsoluteReturnPct / benchmark0050ReturnPct / excessVs0050Pp
schemaVersion field added to snapshot object (value: tr_strategy_snapshot_api_contract_v47)
schema field in response envelope updated from lab_tr_strategy_snapshot_v0 to tr_strategy_snapshot_api_contract_v47

scanner_verification.zero_compoundReturn_check: grep compoundReturn in API response must return 0 matches
scanner_verification.returns_check: response.snapshot.returns must be an object with strategyNetAbsoluteReturnPct / benchmark0050ReturnPct / excessVs0050Pp
